Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, pricing, and seasonal inventory highlights.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates compelling daily marketing email copy including subject lines, body content, and CTAs tailored to R1 Concepts branding and audience segments.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates hours of daily copywriting effort while producing high-quality, personalized email content that maintains brand voice consistency.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the AI-generated email via HubSpot Marketing Email API and sends it to targeted contact lists on a daily schedule.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the Dynamic Friction Company website for current product catalog data, promotions, and featured brake part lines.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates daily marketing email content including subject lines, product descriptions, and calls-to-action customized for DFC's brand and B2B audience.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates and sends the marketing email via HubSpot Marketing Email API to DFC's segmented contact lists.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, issue descriptions, order history, and ticket metadata.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-assigned classification, attaches the draft reply, and routes to the appropriate support team member for review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Ensures every ticket is organized and pre-answered before a human touches it, enabling the support team to handle higher volume with faster resolution times.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured in HubSpot, including customer feedback, return reasons, and product details.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each form submission into a structured Google Sheet with organized columns for issue tracking, filtering, and team analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the operations and product teams a live, shareable dashboard of customer issues to identify recurring problems and reduce return rates.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals on the R1 website, such as page views, product browsing, and form interactions.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chat agent on the R1 Concepts website to answer product questions, check fitment, and assist with orders.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles across multiple platforms.

Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw creator data into a prioritized shortlist, saving the marketing team hours of manual vetting and ensuring only the most relevant creators surface.

Creator Qualifier.impact: Delivers clear, actionable go/no-go recommendations for each creator, accelerating the influencer vetting process from days to minutes.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists from organized Drive folders.
Creator Outreach.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research and template hunting by centralizing all outreach assets in one accessible location for the AI to reference.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences and contextual prompt engineering.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces high-quality, individualized outreach messages at scale that mirror proven engagement patterns, replacing hours of manual copywriting per creator.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators with appropriate sequencing and timing.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts contextually aware reply emails using learned negotiation styles and conversation patterns from previous influencer contacts.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Keeps customers informed without requiring reps to draft individual emails, reducing response time and improving customer satisfaction during backorder situations.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year fitment data and part specifications for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates hours of manual catalog browsing across three competitor sites, capturing comprehensive fitment data that would take days to compile by hand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify overlaps and coverage gaps by vehicle application.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly which vehicle applications DFC already covers and where market opportunities exist, guiding product development decisions with hard data.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotor applications identified in the gap analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates real customer demand before committing to new product development, reducing risk and ensuring inventory investments align with actual market needs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single source of truth combining competitor intelligence, internal coverage, and customer demand signals — ready for immediate product planning decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting the full ad copy from every field including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility into live ad copy across platforms in seconds, replacing the tedious process of manually clicking through each campaign and ad set.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specific target phrases, identifies exact matches, and compiles a flagged list noting the precise field and full copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims instantly across hundreds of ads, preventing costly policy violations or brand inconsistencies.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged report showing every matched phrase, the specific ad and field it was found in, and the surrounding copy for context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report directly to the requester's inbox, enabling immediate remediation without logging into multiple ad platforms.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking 53 total agents — 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. Two new agents were added this week: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool that finds local businesses needing warehouse or office space and sends warm intro emails for the Midway Place sublet, and **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both R1 and DFC. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, keeping our momentum strong heading into next week!
